name: PubMed
access_mode: NCBI E-utilities API
notes: Use PubMed APIs first. Do not scrape page viewer HTML.

name: PubMed Central
access_mode: NCBI APIs and public article assets
notes: Download only open-access assets exposed by PMC.

name: AyurCeL: A comprehensive ayurveda clinical E-learning and decision support platform
access_mode: NCBI PMC full-text XML through E-utilities
notes: High-priority architecture source for reasoning-engine design. Use PMC XML/API assets; do not scrape page viewer HTML.

name: Qigong Institute Research Abstracts
access_mode: polite web fetch after robots check
notes: Respect robots.txt and rate limits.

name: Qigong Institute Podcasts
access_mode: public feeds/assets only
notes: Do not transcribe or redistribute copyrighted audio unless rights allow it.

name: TCM-ID
access_mode: public dataset references and permitted downloads
notes: Use cited dataset references and license terms before downloads.

name: Archive.org
access_mode: metadata API and public download assets
notes: Never bypass lending restrictions, login, encryption, or controlled digital lending.

name: Archive.org Homeopathy Collections
access_mode: metadata API and public download assets
notes: Use only public-domain or open-access assets exposed by Archive.org metadata/download APIs. Never bypass lending restrictions.

name: HathiTrust Homeopathy Public Domain
access_mode: public-domain metadata and permitted full-view assets
notes: Ingest metadata and only full-view/public-domain text where rights clearly allow it. Do not bypass partner login or limited-view restrictions.

name: Project Gutenberg Homeopathy Texts
access_mode: Gutenberg public ebook assets and catalog metadata
notes: Use public Gutenberg text/metadata and preserve license/source notices.

name: Journal of Integrated Standardized Homoeopathy
access_mode: public current issue page with full text and PDF links
notes: High-priority source for standardized homoeopathic methodology, case reports, practitioner reasoning, longitudinal follow-up, and documentation structures. Respect robots.txt and do not bypass site access controls.

name: Ayurveda Intake And Questionnaire Priority Sources
access_mode: public PDFs/pages and open-access arXiv metadata
notes: Extract derived structure only from copyrighted intake forms; do not commit raw questionnaire text unless reuse rights clearly allow it.

name: Charaka Samhita Online
access_mode: polite web fetch after robots check
notes: Respect site terms and avoid large copyrighted extracts.

name: NIIMH e-Charaka
access_mode: public ebook access if permitted
notes: Prefer metadata and links unless reuse terms are explicit.

name: Journal of Ayurveda and Integrative Medicine
access_mode: publisher metadata and open-access PDFs
notes: Never bypass publisher access controls.

name: AYU Journal
access_mode: publisher metadata and open-access PDFs
notes: Never bypass publisher access controls.

name: American Journal of Chinese Medicine
access_mode: metadata only unless article is open access
notes: Do not download paywalled articles.

name: Chinese Journal of Integrative Medicine
access_mode: metadata only unless article is open access
notes: Do not download paywalled articles.

name: Journal of Traditional Chinese Medicine
access_mode: metadata only unless article is open access
notes: Do not download paywalled articles.

name: Journal of Chinese Medicine
access_mode: metadata only unless article is open access
notes: Do not download subscriber-only content.

name: European Journal of Oriental Medicine
access_mode: metadata only unless article is open access
notes: Do not download subscriber-only content.

name: Banyan Botanicals Learning Center
access_mode: polite web fetch after robots check
notes: Use educational articles for pointers, not as clinical authority.

name: Easy Ayurveda
access_mode: polite web fetch after robots check
notes: Use educational articles for pointers, not as clinical authority.
